description: ElevenLabs provides AI audio and voice products, including text-to-speech, speech-to-text, music, dubbing, sound effects, and voice agents. Its platform also includes tools for building and managing conversational voice agents and related workflows.
summary: ElevenLabs exposes a documented REST API at https://api.elevenlabs.io/ authenticated by an `xi-api-key` header, plus an official npm-distributed `elevenlabs` CLI that authenticates with the same API key; its docs also describe connecting external third-party MCP servers, but ElevenLabs does not expose its own public MCP server or GraphQL API.
